title: Raccoon Removal in Travis, Staten Island
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Travis, Staten Island. Licensed experts serving residential areas near William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge. Call today for safe, humane removal. $900 – $4,000.
intro: Travis, Staten Island faces unique raccoon challenges due to its proximity to the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and abundance of single-family homes with attics and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Travis, from the residential streets near Veterans Road West to properties along the Arthur Kill waterfront. Our licensed technicians understand the specific wildlife patterns in this western Staten Island neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of raccoon removal experience to Travis residents, with same-day emergency service available throughout Staten Island. Our team uses humane trapping methods, provides complete exclusion services to prevent re-entry, and offers warranties on all our wildlife control work in the Travis area.
localContext: Travis's suburban character, with many ranch-style homes and properties backing onto wooded areas near the wildlife refuge, creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The neighborhood's proximity to Fresh Kills Park and the marshlands along the Arthur Kill means raccoons frequently seek shelter in residential attics, chimneys, and sheds, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal services in Travis typically range from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. A single raccoon in an accessible attic will cost less than a family of raccoons requiring extensive damage repair and multiple entry point sealing throughout your home.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons so common in Travis?
faqs.answer: Travis's location near the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge, Fresh Kills Park, and wetlands along the Arthur Kill provides abundant natural raccoon habitat. These intelligent animals are drawn to residential areas for food sources like garbage, pet food, and gardens, while the many attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in Travis homes offer perfect denning sites, especially during cold months and breeding season.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Travis home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Travis and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline depends on the situation—a single raccoon may be trapped within a few days, while a mother with babies requires more time and careful handling to ensure humane removal of the entire family, typically 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Travis homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, our comprehensive raccoon removal service includes damage assessment and repair throughout Travis. We repair entry points, replace damaged insulation, clean and decontaminate affected areas, fix torn soffits and fascia, and install preventative exclusion barriers. All repairs are included in our pricing estimate and come with a warranty to ensure raccoons cannot return to your property.
